display_text: Oracle Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances False Promise with invisibility, increased Spell Damage, and reduced Base Attack Time. This upgrade counters burst damage and anti-heal mechanics, transforming Oracle into a powerful enabler for spellcasting carries and ensuring survivability during critical moments.
search_text: Oracle Aghanim Scepter False Promise anti-burst anti-heal invisibility spell damage enable carry

display_text: Oracle Aghanim's Shard: Introduces Rain of Destiny, an area-based ability that damages enemies and boosts ally healing. This counters enemy sustain and heal reduction strategies, shifting Oracle’s role to a teamfight controller with strong area denial and healing amplification.
search_text: Oracle Aghanim Shard Rain of Destiny anti-sustain heal amplification area denial teamfight control
